formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:

[
  {
    "name": "Distance = Speed x Time",
    "formula": "d = vt",
    "variables": "d: distance, v: speed, t: time",
    "units": "m, m/s, s",
    "notes": "Used to calculate distance travelled or covered in a given time period."
  },
  {
    "name": "Speed = Distance / Time",
    "formula": "v = d/t",
    "variables": "v: speed, d: distance, t: time",
    "units": "m/s, m, s",
    "notes": "Used to calculate speed when distance and time are given."
  },
  {
    "name": "Time = Distance / Speed",
    "formula": "t = d/v",

    "units": "s, m, m/s",
    "notes": "Used to calculate time when distance and speed are given."
  },
  {
    "name": "Energy = Work x Time",

  },
  {
    "name": "Work = Force x Distance",
